query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_job_configurations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  job_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT NULL,
  cron_schedule VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  timezone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'America/Chicago' NOT NULL,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  last_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  last_run_status ENUM('completed', 'failed') NULL,
  next_scheduled_run TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notify_on_success BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  notify_on_failure BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  notification_recipients JSON NULL,
  max_retries INT DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL,
  retry_delay_seconds INT DEFAULT 300 NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  job_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT NULL,
  cron_schedule VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,

  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  last_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  last_run_status ENUM('completed', 'failed') NULL,

  notify_on_success BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  notify_on_failure BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  notification_recipients JSON NULL,
  max_retries INT DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL,
  retry_delay_seconds INT DEFAULT 300 NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
